text_excerpt: News | Dr Caroline Johnson Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Caroline News In Parliament My Plan Contact Privacy Policy News Change of Consultation End Date for Cliff Villages Medical Practice Dispensary Monday, 16 March, 2026 Since my last update, Lincolnshire ICB have informed me that the deadline to complete the survey for the Cliff Villages Medical Practice Dispensary is now 12 noon on Tuesday 24 March. The details are copied here and the link for the survey can be found in the comments below. Paper copies of the survey are available at the practice and these should also be returned by 12 noon on Tuesday 24 March...
